briefdescription.para: Test Block Size, must be same as the flash block size.
This function runs a test on the NAND flash device using the basic driver functions.

detaileddescription.para:
The function does the following tasks:
Initialize the driver.
Erase the blocks.
Write in to all the blocks.
Read back the data from the blocks.
Compare the data read against the data Written.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device

simplesect.para: -In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration. -When bad blocks are encountered, they are not erased and programmed.

briefdescription.para: Main function to execute the Nand Flash read write example.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the example has completed successfully.
XST_FAILURE if the example has failed.

briefdescription.para: This file contains a design example using the NAND driver (XNandPs).

detaileddescription.para: This example tests NAND page cache read and write commands. The page cache commands are not supported by OnDie ECC flash since ECC is enabled by default. Tested Spansion S34ML04G100TFI00 flash with this example.

This example tests the block erase, block read and block write features. The flash blocks are erased and written. The data is read back and compared with the data written for correctness. The bad blocks are not erased/programmed.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 nm 04/25/2013 First release. ms 04/10/17 Modified Comment lines to follow doxygen rules 2.8 akm 07/06/23 Add support for system device-tree flow. 2.11 vlt 12/14/25 Update Doxygen comments to include SDT flow details.
